pageTitle.value: Grégoire Courtine's Life in motion - Perpetual Planet - Video

pageCaption.value: Neuroscientist Grégoire Courtine's revolutionary "digital bridge" technology could change the lives of those with spinal cord injuries. Learn more on rolex.org.

WaPageTitle.value: Grégoire Courtine's Life in motion - Perpetual Planet - Video

metadescription.value: Neuroscientist Grégoire Courtine's revolutionary "digital bridge" technology could change the lives of those with spinal cord injuries. Learn more on rolex.org.

text.value: Pioneering neuroscientist and 2019 Rolex Awards Laureate Grégoire Courtine is redefining what is possible in the treatment of devastating spinal cord injuries. As part of our Perpetual Planet Initiative, he recalls the encounters that inspired him, as a young scientist, to dedicate his life to helping paralyzed people walk again. Together with neurosurgeon Jocelyne Bloch, he is now taking his digital bridge technology to a new level by treating a patient who has been unable to walk for 14 years, in the hope of returning her to a “Life in motion”.

video_title.value: Grégoire Courtine's Life in motion - Video

pageCaption.value: Piyush Tewari is determined to save thousands of lives by ensuring that most accident victims in Delhi receive rapid medical care. His foundation, in partnership with hospitals and a medical science institute, has already provided training sessions in basic life support to over 2,000 police officers, as well as 500 ordinary citizens.

pageCaption.value: Billy Lee Lasley’s invention of a non-invasive method for determining the sex of birds — designed to help protect endangered species such as eagles — has slowly been adopted by researchers around the world. Perhaps more importantly, his work has proved to have other uses, including monitoring the reproductive health of women exposed to chemicals in the environment.

pageTitle.value: Felix Brooks-Church's Sanku - Perpetual Planet - Video

pageCaption.value: Social entrepreneur Felix Brooks-church’s mission is to eliminate malnutrition. His “dosifier”, a machine that fortifies flour with essential nutrients at minimal cost, reaches more than 25 million people across East Africa.

WaPageTitle.value: Sanku de Felix Brooks-Church - Perpetual Planet

metadescription.value: With Rolex's support, Felix Brooks-Church and his non-profit Sanku are expanding operations massively into Ethiopia. Watch the video on rolex.org.
